title: View a count of tasks not done
excerpt: It would be great to see a number representing the count of tasks/subitems that are not yet done in the Tasks column. Current that column shows the total number of subitems but without an indication of how much work ther…

posts.author: DaveM (Dave Marsh)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to see a number representing the count of tasks/subitems that are not yet done in the Tasks column. Current that column shows the total number of subitems but without an indication of how much work there is left it means that we have to expand each item to see if there is just a little left or a lot. Thank you!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @DaveM - Could you share a screenshot of your setup, so we can better understand your question? I believe I know what will make this more visual for you, but would like to see the setup first to make sure.

posts.author: DaveM (Dave Marsh)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you and so sorry for the delay replying! We found that summarizing the statuses of sub-items on the parent did the trick but I forgot to come in here and update my question. Thanks again!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
